summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ApnaGhr Visit Platform - multi-role rental property platform with paid visits. All backend APIs (20/20 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly.

issues: Some property images show 'house for rent in bathinda' alt text instead of actual images - may be broken image URLs

critical_code_review_comments: PropertyDetail.js line 27: React Hook useEffect has missing dependency 'loadProperty' - minor eslint warning
seed_data_creation: Seed data already exists - properties, users, and test visits are pre-populated
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: 1) Auth for all roles (customer/rider/admin), 2) Rider shift toggle (online/offline), 3) Property listing and detail pages, 4) Add to cart functionality for multiple properties, 5) Visit cart with booking form, 6) Customer bookings page showing multi-property visits with progress tracking, 7) Visit details modal with rider info and property list. The existing test visit is in 'completed' status with 3 properties.

features_tested.rider_shift_system: PASS - Toggle Online/Offline status working correctly
features_tested.multi_property_visit_display: PASS - Rider sees visits with multiple properties
features_tested.accept_multi_property_visit: PASS - API tested, rider gets customer + all property details
features_tested.step_by_step_navigation: PASS - API endpoints for go_to_customer, at_customer, go_to_property_X, at_property_X, complete_property all working
features_tested.customer_booking_view: PASS - Customer sees multi-property visit with progress (checkmarks for completed properties)
features_tested.property_cart: PASS - Customer can add multiple properties to cart
features_tested.visit_cart_checkout: PASS - Customer can book all properties in one visit with date/time/pickup location
